---
title: "Instructor Only: Geographic Comparison Without Maps Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
places <- read_csv("data/real/places_county_core_measures_long.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

maryland_smoking <- places |>
  filter(
    state == "MD",
    measure_key == "current_smoking",
    !is.na(estimate),
    !is.na(ci_lower),
    !is.na(ci_upper)
  ) |>
  mutate(county_name = reorder(county_name, estimate))

ggplot(maryland_smoking, aes(x = county_name, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), width = 0.2, color = "gray60") +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Current-Smoking Estimates Across Maryland Counties",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Current smoking estimate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
